decision: Refactor users domain around narrower contracts and typed sentinels
reason: The users package had several service methods coupled directly to the full repository contract and concrete projection helpers. Splitting those uses into narrower interfaces and generic projection application preserves substitutability without changing the external service API.
impact: Scoped users-domain service logic now depends on minimal repository capabilities, returns normalized empty collections, and keeps user/public/private projections interchangeable through shared personal-link application helpers.
